lab.title: 光軌 Style Laboratory
lab.htmlTitle: 光軌 | Versioned Three.js Style Laboratory
lab.htmlDescription: 光軌是一個版本化的 three.js 前端風格實驗室，使用者可以切換並比較多個完整網站版本。
lab.releaseNotes: 本輪已完成 shared navigator 的 URL / history sync 修補並通過本地驗證；預計以單一 commit 收束，但 sandbox DNS 無法解析 github.com，因此目前仍是 committed-not-pushed。
lab.liveVerificationNotes: 最後一次可確認的線上觀測（2026-03-27T23:37:13+08:00）顯示 hosted page 尚未反映當時的 v005 工作樹；本輪因 sandbox DNS 無法解析 okok147.github.io，未能重新驗證目前線上狀態。

versions.title: Orbit Cinematic
versions.concept: 把品牌首頁當成宇宙海報來閱讀，讓單一核心物件帶著文字與章節完成整頁敘事。
sourcePrinciples: Poster-first hero with one dominant visual anchor
Scroll phases that move the scene instead of just the document
Thin technical stack with explicit cleanup and deploy readiness
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 品牌發表頁 / 世界觀首頁
versions.bestFor: 第一次進實驗室時先理解世界觀型首頁的基線。
versions.navigationModel: 固定頂部導覽對應長頁章節
versions.motionLanguage: 高對比 orbital drift 與 section-driven camera shift
versions.narrativeStructure: 海報式 hero -> scroll narrative -> implementation stack -> archive closing
versions.sceneTreatment: 全頁舞台中央的單一 3D 主物件
notableUxIdeas: 單一核心物件隨頁面進度切換三種閱讀狀態
固定頁首導覽對應長頁面章節
以 reference archive 收束整頁，不讓結尾失焦
notableFeatureIdeas: research links embedded in the page narrative
performanceNotes: Scene teardown disposes geometry, materials, textures, env map, and renderer context.
Single-core geometry language avoids heavy model loading.

versions.snapshotNotes: 目前只有概念海報預覽，這一輪尚未在 sandbox 內產生真實瀏覽器截圖。
versions.releaseNotes: 這份版本註冊已推送 main；是否已進入目前 hosted site 仍以 lab-level live verification notes 為準。

versions.title: Signal Ledger
versions.concept: 把作品集首頁翻成可翻閱的編輯帳冊，讓版本、方法與研究來源一起成為主要內容。
sourcePrinciples: Editorial layout with fluid columns and strong reading rhythm
In-page navigation that keeps long-form pages scannable
Reduced-motion aware 3D ambiance instead of full-canvas spectacle
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 作品集索引 / 方法論首頁
versions.bestFor: 快速瀏覽版本治理、方法論與研究來源。
versions.navigationModel: 雜誌式頁首導覽與長文 section anchors
versions.motionLanguage: 低振幅 editorial drift 與溫和 reveal
versions.narrativeStructure: manifesto hero -> version collection -> lab method -> archive notes
versions.sceneTreatment: 被裁切為右側儀表面板的 3D ambience
notableUxIdeas: 把 style family 與 use-case 直接做成條目清單
方法區塊把 research -> distill -> generate -> validate 顯性化
把研究來源與版本治理拉進前台而不是藏在 README
notableFeatureIdeas: paper-toned layout with clipped 3D instrument panel
version registry surfaced in the global dock
journal-ready archive structure for future searchable browser
performanceNotes: Scene motion multipliers reduced for calmer editorial reading.
Canvas is visually clipped but still uses the same cleanup-safe renderer lifecycle.
No extra framework or component runtime added.

versions.title: Museum Monograph
versions.concept: 把版本實驗室翻成策展型作品頁，讓 3D 核心物件像被置入展櫃的展件，文字則像 curator note、specimen register 與 study room。
sourcePrinciples: One dominant exhibit with metadata kept quiet and peripheral
Visible in-page wayfinding and skip paths for long-form reading
Framed WebGL presentation with restrained motion and explicit cleanup discipline
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 案例深讀頁 / 策展型作品展示
versions.bestFor: 深讀單一案例與版本家族關係。
versions.navigationModel: 左側固定 rail + 右側展件視窗的雙軸導覽
versions.motionLanguage: 展牌式 reveal 與 gallery drift
versions.narrativeStructure: curator note -> exhibition plates -> specimen register -> study room
versions.sceneTreatment: 被框進展櫃的 3D 展件
notableUxIdeas: 左側固定章節 rail，右側固定展櫃視窗，形成雙軸閱讀
把 performance notes 與 UX ideas 改寫成 specimen register
在 study room 內直接展示 version wall，而不只依賴外層 dock
notableFeatureIdeas: framed exhibit case around the shared three.js scene
monograph-style reading rhythm with dark gallery atmosphere
performanceNotes: Canvas remains on the shared renderer lifecycle with full teardown on version switch.
Motion multipliers are reduced to gallery drift and reduced-motion still collapses animation.
Framed presentation avoids expensive post-processing and keeps the 1.8 pixel ratio cap.

versions.title: Instrument Deck
versions.concept: 把版本實驗室翻成可操作的觀測控制桌，讓 mode registry、verification log 與 scoped telemetry scene 一起成為首頁主體。
sourcePrinciples: Operator dashboards should frontload state, hierarchy, and decision cues instead of hiding them behind decorative panels
Mode switching can become the primary narrative as long as the current state and next action stay legible
Scoped WebGL wells create a controllable live instrument without returning to full-bleed spectacle
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 版本控制台 / 操作型首頁
versions.bestFor: 先掃描整個版本庫與發布真實度，再決定要深入哪個介面世界。
versions.navigationModel: sticky command header + mode registry rows + verification anchors
versions.motionLanguage: scanline telemetry drift 與受控 scope pulse
versions.narrativeStructure: operator command -> live scope -> mode registry -> verification log -> signal library
versions.sceneTreatment: 被收束進 scoped live well 的 telemetry core
notableUxIdeas: 把所有版本先排成 mode registry rows，讓切換本身成為主要閱讀節奏
把 release truth、scene treatment 與 best-for 直接並排，縮短判斷時間
把方法、實作與 performance notes 攤成 verification log，而不是藏在 repo 說明
notableFeatureIdeas: operator-style hero with scoped live scene well
mode registry rows that surface release state and scene profile
verification board that turns method and implementation into visible console modules
performanceNotes: The shared renderer lifecycle and disposal path remain unchanged on version switch.
The scene stays bounded inside a scoped well, avoiding a return to full-bleed WebGL spectacle.
Motion stays on the shared reduced-motion path and still respects the 1.8 renderer pixel ratio cap.

versions.releaseNotes: 這份版本註冊與實作已推送 main；是否已進入目前 hosted site 仍以 lab-level live verification notes 為準。

versions.title: Tidal Atlas
versions.concept: 把版本實驗室翻成潮汐圖譜與海圖桌，讓每個版本像航道、測深點與海流一起被閱讀，而 3D 核心則像被封存在光盒裡的海玻璃標本。
sourcePrinciples: Cartographic layouts should use contours, route marks, and restrained landmark density so key annotations guide scanning without collapsing into ornament
A strong atmospheric hero can coexist with technical detail when the annotations are spatially ranked and the page keeps one dominant chart window
Bounded WebGL inside a light-case viewport preserves presence while keeping the reading surface calm and deployable
versions.useCaseEmphasis: 版本探索頁 / 導航型首頁
versions.bestFor: 想先感受風格氛圍，同時又要快速辨識版本航向、用途與敘事差異。
versions.navigationModel: latitude header + route bands + sounding sections
versions.narrativeStructure: chart preface -> current routes -> soundings -> beacon room
versions.sceneTreatment: 被封存在 bathymetric light case 的 sea-glass core
notableUxIdeas: 把版本清單改寫成航道列，讓切換像選擇潮流與路徑
把 method、UX 與 performance notes 改寫成 soundings，維持導航感而不是文件感
讓研究來源與 feature tracks 變成 beacon room，讓頁面最後仍保有方向線索
notableFeatureIdeas: chart-window hero with bounded sea-glass scene
route list that foregrounds best-for and narrative direction
annotation corridor that turns lab metadata into navigational markings
performanceNotes: Scene remains on the shared renderer lifecycle with the same disposal discipline on version switch.
The chart window keeps WebGL bounded to a single hero viewport instead of returning to full-page spectacle.
Motion stays on the shared reduced-motion path and preserves the 1.8 renderer pixel ratio cap.
